item.title: Open University Student Dropout Analysis
item.description:
Open University Student Dropout Analysis

A predictive data analysis project exploring factors influencing student dropout rates at The Open University.

📊 Data & Tools

  • Programming: Python, Jupyter Notebook
  • Data Processing: Pandas, NumPy, Excel, SQL
  • Predictive Modeling: Scikit-learn, Decision Trees, Logistic Regression
  • Data Visualization: Tableau

🔍 Key Insights

  • Visualized dropout trends and student retention rates.
  • Analyzed correlations between demographics, engagement, and dropouts.

🔗 View Tableau Dashboard
